name: Echo Protocol
description: You don't remember this case, but it remembers every loop. A native psychological mystery with shifting evidence, archive dives, and escalating reality drift. Enhanced with real-time shifts, achievement tracking, clue combinations, and deep archive exploration.

items: Real-time shift clock with countdown and difficulty modes (Normal 720min / Hard 360min / Speedrun).
Clue combination system - discover 20+ combinations to unlock new scenes and story branches.
Consequence preview system - hover over choices to see stat changes before committing.
Rank progression system - 7 tiers from Cadet to Architect with point-based advancement.
Achievement tracking - 40+ badges with auto-unlock system and reward scoring.
Enhanced message system with Radio, SMS, Signals, and System alerts.
Deep Archive mega mode with 16 districts, 384 cases, and 1,536 investigation layers.
Quick-save/load system - F1-F8 for instant slot access, Ctrl+S/L for quick save.
15+ new story branches triggered by clue combinations and decisions.
Improved UI with smooth animations, better colors, and cinematic fullscreen layout.
Retuned the opening case framing and presentation for the Case Spiral build.
Kept native executable launch while refreshing the in-app mystery atmosphere.
Prepared archive-based delivery for launcher-driven game updates.
Kept native executable launch and local save behavior unchanged.
Prepared archive-based delivery for launcher-driven game updates.
Kept native executable launch and local save behavior unchanged.

Kept native executable launch and local save behavior unchanged.
Introduced native EXE launch for improved performance and stability.
Implemented one-folder direct install workflow for seamless local updates.
Replaced browser-based startup with direct executable launch from the library.
Minor internal improvements and structural optimizations.
